entities.summary: Apply rotary position encoding to query/key tensors

detail.name: apply_rotary_emb
detail.description: Rotates Q/K vectors by position-dependent angle. Encodes relative position information into attention scores.
detail.why: Transformers have no inherent position sense — RoPE injects position via rotation

takeaway.explain: Encode position by rotating vector pairs. Attention dot product then naturally encodes relative distance. No learned position embeddings needed.
takeaway.rationale: Used here because: Transformers have no inherent position sense — RoPE injects position via rotation

takeaway.explain: Treat pairs of dimensions as complex numbers. Multiply by e^(iθ) to rotate. Equivalent to 2D rotation matrix but more elegant.
takeaway.rationale: Used here because: Transformers have no inherent position sense — RoPE injects position via rotation

entities.summary: Precomputes rotation frequencies for all positions

detail.name: RotaryEmbedding
detail.description: Computes cos/sin tables at initialization for fast lookup during forward pass.

takeaway.explain: Compute expensive trig functions once at init, store as buffer. Forward pass is just a table lookup — O(1) vs O(n) per call.
takeaway.rationale: Computes cos/sin tables at initialization for fast lookup during forward pass

detail.perf: Precomputed tables avoid recomputing cos/sin every forward pass

entities.summary: Initialize frequency bands and precompute rotation tables

detail.name: __init__
detail.description: Creates geometric frequency sequence (θ_i = base^(-2i/d)) and precomputes cos/sin for max_position.

takeaway.explain: Lower dimensions rotate faster (high frequency), higher dimensions slower. Creates multi-scale position encoding.
takeaway.rationale: Creates geometric frequency sequence (θ_i = base^(-2i/d)) and precomputes cos/sin for max_position

entities.summary: Look up precomputed rotations for given positions

detail.name: forward
detail.description: Index into cos/sin tables with position indices. Returns rotation vectors ready for apply_rotary_emb.

takeaway.explain: Forward pass is just tensor indexing into precomputed tables. No computation — pure memory access. Maximum throughput.
takeaway.rationale: Index into cos/sin tables with position indices

entities.summary: Factory function creating RotaryEmbedding with model config

detail.name: get_rope
detail.description: Convenience constructor extracting rope parameters from model config dict.

takeaway.explain: Function that creates and configures objects. Simpler than constructor when configuration comes from external sources (config dicts, files).
takeaway.rationale: Convenience constructor extracting rope parameters from model config dict
takeaway.cross_lang: Java static factory method, Rust ::new() convention, Go NewXxx() functions, TypeScript create functions
takeaway.gotcha: Over-abstracting with factories hides what's being created — use only when construction logic is non-trivial
